name: Exergis
description: Feel the kick of this Corpus shotgun as it shatters a high-yield crystal into anyone and anything standing in your way.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Feel the kick of this Corpus shotgun as it shatters a high-yield crystal into anyone and anything standing in your way.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Repeller Systems
components.description:
Anti-gravity system that allows massively heavy objects to be manipulated by a single user. 

Location: Obtained by completing Heists on the Orb Vallis (Venus)

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed weapons with 1 bullet in their magazine (such as Vectis and Exergis) bypassing the Fire Rate limit if equipped with a max rank Arcane Pistoleer.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.4 + 25.7.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed firing Exergis at the right time as Gauss’ Redline is activated causing you to be able to fire it continuously without needing to reload.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a little hitch in the reload animation of the Exergis.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Polished the Exergis reload animation for smoothness.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Exergis not actually shattering the crystal.
